name: Lot of TROUBLE!
description: I'm in a Lot of TROUBLE!
hints: You're in big trouble! Something went very wrong.
This usually means you entered the fun house without proper preparation.
You may have tried to GO FUN without buying a ticket first.
You'll need to restart. Buy a ticket before entering the fun house!
notes: Death/failure room. Reached by entering the fun house without a ticket or other fatal actions. No exits - must restart.
